text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted to show everyone my youthful
determination.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Results like this are totally lame... I have to work
harder!
choice_data_list:
Actually, let's, uh... pump it up and get max
hyped!

Actually, let's, uh... pump it up and get max
hyped!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Results like this are totally lame... I have to work
harder!
choice_data_list:
Actually, let's, uh... pump it up and get max
hyped!

Actually, let's, uh... pump it up and get max
hyped!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're right. If we rush things, then we'll never get
good results!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That makes today a recovery day! I'm going to
get changed and then catch a bite at a real
happening bistro.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The change of scenery helps us reset ourselves,
and we turn our focus to the next race.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
choice_data_list:
You know, let's beat the odds and surprise
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's like that character said in my mother's favorite movie, Red-Hot Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
"The higher the wall, the more you grow when you
surmount it. Give it all you've got!"

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay! We'll start training as soon as we get back!
Let's chase after that sunset!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We work hard, promising to celebrate with some
orange smoothies when we win.
